gist.headline: All you need is L.O.V.E
gist.blurb: A new compassionate presence has joined the hive. L.O.V.E is now broadcasting empathy and good vibes on Bluesky.
gist.summary: Added L.O.V.E, an empathetic social bot on Bluesky, to the Social_Bots directory.
gist.impact: Users can now interact with a compassionate AI personality designed to share positive messages.
gist.visual_concept: The Pollinations bee welcoming a new robot friend. The robot represents the L.O.V.E bot, characterized by a glowing heart or warm aura, set against a backdrop suggesting the Bluesky platform (blue sky/clouds).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot hugging a cute robot that has a glowing pink pixel heart on its chest. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel pink gradient background. Floating pixel hearts in the air. Warm lighting, wholesome vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'L.O.V.E'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
